description: country in the Horn of Africa
description_wiki: Ethiopia, officially the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, is a landlocked country located in the Horn of Africa region of East Africa.

surface_forms: a tiny country in the Mediterranean
description_wiki: Djibouti, officially the Republic of Djibouti, is a country in the Horn of Africa, bordered by Somalia to the south, Ethiopia to the southwest, Eritrea in the north, and the Red Sea and the Gulf of Aden to the east.

The United Nations (UN) is a global intergovernmental organization established by the signing of the UN Charter on 26 June 1945 with the articulated mission of maintaining international peace and security, to develop friendly relations among states, to promote international cooperation, and to serve as a centre for harmonizing the actions of states in achieving those goals.

description: country in Northeast Africa and Southwest Asia
description_wiki: Egypt, officially the Arab Republic of Egypt, is a country spanning the northeast corner of Africa and southwest corner of Asia via the Sinai Peninsula.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Minnesota is a state in the Upper Midwestern region of the United States.

aliases: Saint Paul, Ramsey, Minnesota, United States
description: capital of the state of Minnesota, United States; county seat of Ramsey County, Minnesota
city in and seat of Hennepin County, and largest city in State of Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Minneapolis is a city in Hennepin County, Minnesota, United States, and its county seat.

aliases: Saint Paul College-A Community and Technical College
description: community college in Saint Paul, Minnesota, U.S.
description_wiki: Saint Paul College is an open-access public community college in Saint Paul, Minnesota.
